description_long: This is a matte black military helicopter with a streamlined fuselage and a prominent tail boom. The cockpit is located at the front, with a slightly angular nose and visible sensor or targeting equipment beneath. The helicopter features two stubby side wings, each equipped with hardpoints for mounting weaponry or equipment. The landing gear is fixed and robust, suitable for rough terrain. The tail section is elongated, ending in a vertical stabilizer and a tail rotor, with the main rotor hub visible atop the fuselage.
description: A matte black military helicopter with side weapon mounts, angular cockpit, and a long tail boom ending in a vertical stabilizer.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the main rotor hub, symmetrical stub wings, and the full length of the tail boom.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit profile, side-mounted weapon hardpoints, and the extended tail with landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the angular nose, cockpit windows, and the symmetrical placement of the stub wings and landing gear.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cockpit, weapon mounts, and tail structure.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible hardpoints, one on each side wing, suitable for mounting machine guns or missile launchers.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to have integrated armor plating, especially around the cockpit and fuselage, with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid matte black paint scheme.
attribute_military_markings: A circular insignia is visible on the side of the fuselage; no other markings or numbers are apparent.
